Call ID: EXT-030
Type: external
Date: 2026-03-23
Topic: Churn Risk & Escalation
Participants: Naomi (account manager); Carlos (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Naomi): Hi Carlos, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Carlos): The outages last quarter really shook our confidence.
AM (Naomi): Let me get you a firm commitment on the compliance roadmap.
Customer (Carlos): We've had a mixed experience, to be candid.
AM (Naomi): I hear you, and I want to make this right — let's build a plan.
Customer (Carlos): Let's reconvene in two weeks — the clock is ticking for us.
AM (Naomi): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
